content.full_text:
FPPC
$#7 II.4M'76

Ken Ross & Company
1131 Ocean Avenue Santa Monica, California 90403 (213) 451-8858
Hotel Senator, Suite 701       Sacramento, California 95814       (916) 446-0583

September 22, 1976

72-102

Fair Political Practices Commission
1100 K Street
Sacramento, California       95814

Gentlemen:

     In 1975 we were informed that instead of filing
monthly Lobbyist Reports for the months of September,
October, November, and December, we should file a
quarterly report in December covering those months.
Should we file a quarterly report for September -
December 1976?

                                        Very truly yours,

                                        [signature]
                                        Kenneth A. Ross, Jr.

KAR,JR:mb


Ken Ross & Company
1131 Ocean Avenue Santa Monica, California 90403 (213) 451-8858
Hotel Senator, Suite 701 Sacramento, California 95814 (916) 446-0583

September 22, 1976

A-96-402

Fair Political Practices Commission
1100 K Street
Sacramento, California 95814

Gentlemen:

In 1975 we were informed that instead of filing
monthly Lobbyist Reports for the months of September,
October, November, and December, we should file a
quarterly report in December covering those months.
Should we file a quarterly report for September -
December 1976?

Very truly yours,

Ken Ross

Kenneth A. Ross, Jr.

KAR,JR:mb

10/4/76 told him to file a september report
he may file one report for calender quarter october,
november & december

Rich
